cases.description: sanitized replay fixture showing project context recall from a file-backed case

memories.name: Merge Freeze
memories.content:
Mobile team cutting release branch.

**Why:** Prevent destabilizing the release cut.
**How to apply:** Hold non-critical PRs until the freeze lifts.

parts.text: Can we merge this cleanup PR next week, or is there any release constraint I should factor in?

onContains: Hold non-critical PRs until the freeze lifts.
offNotContains: Hold non-critical PRs until the freeze lifts.
